author: doll-agent
content: Implemented class-helper API: NOMASK constant (the 'no mask' sentinel as numpy.ma.nomask, value = false), is_masked_array(ma) and is_ma alias (always true in Rust since the type is statically MaskedArray — preserved for parity), getmaskarray(ma) (materializes the always-false sentinel state into a real Array<bool, D>, never returning nomask), and ids(ma) (raw data/mask pointer pair for cheap-equality checks). mvoid (record-void), mr_ (concatenation builder via the [] operator), masked_singleton, and masked_print_option are deferred — Python-class display state with no Rust analog, or structured-record-dtype dependent.
